2026-03-04FAOther Than Statutory AuthorityAppointment of the Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary of Canada to the Republic of LiberiaAppointment of Sandra Choufani as Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary of Canada to the Republic of Liberia, with residence in Abidjan.N/A
subject: Appointment of the Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary of Canada to the Republic of Liberia
precis: Appointment of Sandra Choufani as Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary of Canada to the Republic of Liberia, with residence in Abidjan.
